label: Burcht Doornhorst (ruïne)
summary: Een burcht die ooit echt heeft bestaan, ongeveer 3 eeuwen geleden, ergens in de heuvels van het Doornveld.
fullText: Een burcht die ooit echt heeft bestaan, ongeveer 3 eeuwen geleden, ergens in de heuvels van het Doornveld. Nu een ruïne. In Harrie's hallucinatie staat ze er nog gloednieuw bij.
fullHtml: Een burcht die ooit echt heeft bestaan, ongeveer 3 eeuwen geleden, ergens in de heuvels van het Doornveld. Nu een ruïne. In Harrie's hallucinatie staat ze er nog gloednieuw bij.

label: Daggerford
summary: Daggerford was a small but consequential town located in the Delimbiyr Vale within the greater Sword Coast.
fullText: Daggerford was a small but consequential town located in the Delimbiyr Vale within the greater Sword Coast. Sitting atop a hill in the center of Daggerford was the grand Ducal Castle , which was technically older than the town itself. On a small hill near the town was an entrance to a nearby song path , a network of portals that were connected to works of oratorical art, such as songs and epic poems. The song path near Daggerford was referred to as the Voices of the Lost , named for the song that was required for its opening. Gillian's Hill , Liam's Hold , and Black Helm Tower were each within a day's travel of Daggerford. While people of Daggerford were largely self–sufficient, they did import lumber from Andalor's Mill in Bowshot . /website location
fullHtml:
Daggerford was a small but consequential town located in the Delimbiyr Vale within the greater Sword Coast.

Sitting atop a hill in the center of Daggerford was the grand Ducal Castle, which was technically older than the town itself.

On a small hill near the town was an entrance to a nearby song path , a network of portals that were connected to works of oratorical art, such as songs and epic poems. The song path near Daggerford was referred to as the Voices of the Lost , named for the song that was required for its opening.

Gillian's Hill, Liam's Hold, and Black Helm Tower were each within a day's travel of Daggerford.

While people of Daggerford were largely self–sufficient, they did import lumber from Andalor's Mill in Bowshot.

/website location

label: Naelith's neat magic spire
summary: De "wizard's" tower van [character:9355616] het is tegen de noordkant van de berg ten noord oosten van Daggerford gebouwd.
fullText: De "wizard's" tower van [character:9355616] het is tegen de noordkant van de berg ten noord oosten van Daggerford gebouwd. Zo'n 115 jaar geleden trok hij in en 48 jaar geleden trok hij er weer uit. Tegenwoordig wonen er vooral een hoop kenku/raven in de toren. De toren is door meerdere groepen leeg gehaald qua loot. Little Ki is hier gevonden door de spelers. De weg naar de toren toe is opgeblazen door [character:9085736] Door het onzorgvuldige gebruik van magic is in de omgeving verschillende speciale en magische planten te vinden, zoals "Glowing daisies" en "Zuchtende Aleppodennen" waar je Witherbark vanaf kan halen.
fullHtml:

Door het onzorgvuldige gebruik van magic is in de omgeving verschillende speciale en magische planten te vinden, zoals "Glowing daisies" en "Zuchtende Aleppodennen" waar je Witherbark vanaf kan halen.

label: High Moor
summary: The High Moor was a large, monster-infested, open moorland in western Faerûn , bordered on the east by the Serpent Hills and on the west by the Misty Forest .
fullText: The High Moor was a large, monster-infested, open moorland in western Faerûn , bordered on the east by the Serpent Hills and on the west by the Misty Forest . [ 1 ]
fullHtml: The High Moor was a large, monster-infested, open moorland in western Faerûn , bordered on the east by the Serpent Hills and on the west by the Misty Forest .

label: Orogoth
summary: Orogoth was one of the most dangerous locations in the High Moor [ 1 ] [ 4 ] and was known for the presence of black dragons .
fullText: Orogoth was one of the most dangerous locations in the High Moor [ 1 ] [ 4 ] and was known for the presence of black dragons . [ 5 ]
fullHtml: Orogoth was one of the most dangerous locations in the High Moor and was known for the presence of black dragons .

label: RED the Robot Parrot
summary: RED, short for REDACTED, is a robot parrot previously owned by the former brewer and barkeep.
fullText: RED, short for REDACTED, is a robot parrot previously owned by the former brewer and barkeep. RED used to have a name, however it was ehr.. redacted. The parrot is quite vulgar but luckily doesn't know the proper curse words. Her former owner programmed RED to provide any takers with more or less usefull information regarding the bar and brewery. RED is capable of understanding common language but might not always provide the answers some might hope for. Once everywhile RED will receive scheduled upgrades which will unlock additional information.
fullHtml:
RED, short for REDACTED, is a robot parrot previously owned by the former brewer and barkeep. RED used to have a name, however it was ehr.. redacted. The parrot is quite vulgar but luckily doesn't know the proper curse words.

Her former owner programmed RED to provide any takers with more or less usefull information regarding the bar and brewery. RED is capable of understanding common language but might not always provide the answers some might hope for.

Once everywhile RED will receive scheduled upgrades which will unlock additional information.
